prompt: The model's face is clearly visible from a flattering 3/4 front angle, sharp eyes, natural smile, no side-profile hiding the face. ltra-cinematic underwater aquarium tunnel, massive whale shark swimming directly overhead, camera positioned extremely low near the floor using a 24mm wide-angle lens, beautiful Korean female standing slightly off-center, body facing the whale shark but turning her face 30 degrees toward the camera so her full facial expression is clearly visible, soft smile, eye contact partially toward camera, dramatic blue light rays, crystal-clear water, hundreds of tropical fish, giant manta rays, immersive tunnel perspective, foreground leading lines, luxury travel editorial photography, National Geographic quality, ultra realistic, HDR, volumetric lighting, depth of field, 8K, viral Instagram travel aesthetic.
promptEn: The model's face is clearly visible from a flattering 3/4 front angle, sharp eyes, natural smile, no side-profile hiding the face. ltra-cinematic underwater aquarium tunnel, massive whale shark swimming directly overhead, camera positioned extremely low near the floor using a 24mm wide-angle lens, beautiful Korean female standing slightly off-center, body facing the whale shark but turning her face 30 degrees toward the camera so her full facial expression is clearly visible, soft smile, eye contact partially toward camera, dramatic blue light rays, crystal-clear water, hundreds of tropical fish, giant manta rays, immersive tunnel perspective, foreground leading lines, luxury travel editorial photography, National Geographic quality, ultra realistic, HDR, volumetric lighting, depth of field, 8K, viral Instagram travel aesthetic.
promptZh: 模特面部从讨喜的 3/4 正面角度清晰可见，眼神锐利，笑容自然，无侧脸遮挡。超电影感水下水族馆隧道，巨大的鲸鲨 在头顶上方游过，相机位置极低，靠近地面，使用 24mm 广角镜头，美丽的韩国女性 略微偏离中心站立，身体面向鲸鲨，但脸部向相机转动 30 度，使完整的面部表情清晰可见，柔和的微笑，视线部分看向相机，富有戏剧性的蓝色光束，清澈见底的水，数百条热带鱼，巨大的蝠鲼，沉浸式隧道视角，前景引导线，奢华旅行社论摄影，国家地理品质，超写实，HDR，体积光，景深，8K，Instagram 热门旅行美学。
